channel.title: BC forest comment alerts: Vancouver Island
channel.description: Forest Operations Map blocks with an open public comment period around Port Renfrew, Lake Cowichan, Nitinat, Alberni Valley, Sooke, Campbell River, and Gold River. Built from BC public open data.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block ROA25-1 open until 2026-07-03
item.description: Alberni Valley area. Planned 2026-10-15. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-03. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block F036001 open until 2026-07-03
item.description: Alberni Valley area. Planned 2026-10-15. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-03. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.description: Alberni Valley area. Planned 2026-10-15. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-03. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block NIL25-1 open until 2026-07-03
item.description: Alberni Valley area. Planned 2026-10-15. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-03. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block 171128 open until 2026-07-24
item.description: Franklin River. Planned 2026-06-16. near a fish record. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block HAN012 open until 2026-07-31
